updates.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Father > Day 3 > Lunch > Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style

short_description.from: Colorful Mediterranean-inspired snack plate featuring hummus, whole-wheat pita, veggies, and a cheese component for protein, fiber, and healthy fats.
short_description.to: A café-style sandwich with sliced turkey, creamy Havarti, crisp lettuce, tomato, and a light herb mayo on multigrain bread — modeled after popular Starbucks sandwich offerings for a convenient, balanced lunch.

name.from: Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style

nutrition_note.from: This plate provides protein from hummus and cheese, plus fiber from whole-wheat pita and vegetables, and healthy fats from tahini in hummus. It offers a balanced mix of complex carbs, protein, and fats. Watch sodium from store-bought hummus and cheese; consider reduced-sodium options or smaller portions if needed. For a lighter version, you can reduce cheese or use part-skim options.
nutrition_note.to: Provides lean protein from turkey and calcium from Havarti; whole-grain bread adds fiber and sustained energy. Choose light mayo or reduced-fat cheese to lower saturated fat. Pairing with fruit or a side salad increases vitamins and fiber and balances the meal. Watch sodium from deli turkey; opt for lower-sodium slices when possible.

meal_suggestion.from: As a Citrus Fresh-style snack: assemble with 2–3 tablespoons hummus, 1 small whole-wheat pita cut into wedges, cucumber slices, cherry tomatoes, and a small cheese wedge. Add a squeeze of lemon or citrus zest to brighten the flavors. If dairy-free, omit cheese or substitute with a plant-based option.
meal_suggestion.to: Warm the multigrain bread slightly if desired. Layer 3–4 slices of roasted turkey, a slice of Havarti cheese, lettuce, and tomato. Spread a thin layer of herb mayonnaise or light aioli on the bread. Serve with a side of fresh fruit or a small salad to boost fiber and produce. For extra protein, add an extra turkey slice; for lower fat, choose reduced-fat cheese or skip the mayo.

updates.reasoning: Transformed the Day 3 lunch from a hummus snack plate into a Starbucks-style sandwich as requested. All meal fields were rewritten to reflect the new sandwich meal identity.
